FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201225
WHERE EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20201230' AND '20210106'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201225 AS e2
    WHERE e2.USER_PSEUDO_ID = e1.USER_PSEUDO_ID
    AND e2.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20210105' AND '20210106'
    AND e2.EVENT_NAME IN ('user_engagement')
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201225 AS e3
    WHERE e3.USER_PSEUDO_ID = e1.USER_PSEUDO_ID
    AND e3.EVENT_DATE BETWEEN '20210104' AND '20210105'
    AND e3.EVENT_NAME IN ('user_engagement')
)

sql: WITH CustomerPurchases AS (SELECT fullVisitorId, [SELECT DISTINCT item.productSKU FROM LATERAL ARRAY_FLATTEN(input => totals.transactions.items) AS t(item)] AS purchasedProducts FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805 WHERE DATE(date) BETWEEN '2017-07-01' AND '2017-07-31' AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(CAST('Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley' AS VARIANT), [SELECT DISTINCT item.productSKU FROM LATERAL ARRAY_FLATTEN(input => totals.transactions.items) AS t(item)])), TopSellingProduct AS (SELECT purchasedProducts[EXCLUDE(CHARINDEX('Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley', purchasedProducts))] AS topSellingProduct FROM CustomerPurchases) SELECT topSellingProduct FROM TopSellingProduct WHERE NOT topSellingProduct IS NULL
original_sql:
WITH CustomerPurchases AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT item.productSKU FROM UNNEST(totals.transactions.items) AS t(item)) AS purchasedProducts
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
    WHERE 
        DATE(date) BETWEEN '2017-07-01' AND '2017-07-31'
        AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT item.productSKU FROM UNNEST(totals.transactions.items) AS t(item)), 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley')
),
TopSellingProduct AS (
    SELECT 
        purchasedProducts[EXCLUDE(POSITION('Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley' IN purchasedProducts))] AS topSellingProduct
    FROM 
        CustomerPurchases
)
SELECT 
    topSellingProduct
FROM 
    TopSellingProduct
WHERE 
    topSellingProduct IS NOT NULL

sql:
WITH MonthlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT 
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters AS adwordCriteria,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        SUM(TRY_CAST(totals.transactionRevenue AS FLOAT)) AS totalRevenue
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160916
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20171231'
    GROUP BY 
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters, 
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD'))
)
SELECT 
    adwordCriteria,
    ROUND(MAX(totalRevenue), 2) - ROUND(MIN(totalRevenue), 2) AS revenueDifference
FROM 
    MonthlyRevenue
GROUP BY 
    adwordCriteria

sql:
WITH FirstVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        visitorId, 
        MIN(date) AS firstVisitDate
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160810
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228'
    GROUP BY 
        visitorId
),
FirstTransaction AS (
    SELECT 
        visitorId, 
        MIN(date) AS firstTransactionDate, 
        device.deviceCategory
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160810
    JOIN 
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hits) AS hit
    JOIN 
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => TRY_CAST(hit.eCommerceAction AS VARIANT)) AS action
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228'
        AND action.action_type = 'purchase'
    GROUP BY 
        visitorId, 
        device.deviceCategory
)
SELECT 
    fv.visitorId, 
    DATEDIFF(DAY, fv.firstVisitDate, ft.firstTransactionDate) AS daysElapsed, 
    ft.deviceCategory
FROM 
    FirstVisit fv
JOIN 
    FirstTransaction ft ON fv.visitorId = ft.visitorId

JOIN 
    FirstTransaction ft ON fv.visitorId = ft.visitorId

sql:
WITH RevenueData AS (
    SELECT
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters AS adParams,
        SUM(TRY_CAST(totals.totalTransactionRevenue AS FLOAT)) / 1000000 AS totalRevenue,
        DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS day,
        DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS week,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160822
    WHERE
        date BETWEEN '20160822' AND '20160915'
    GROUP BY
        adParams, day, week, month
)
SELECT
    adParams,
    MAX(totalRevenue) AS maxDailyRevenue,
    MAX(COALESCE(SUM(totalRevenue), 0)) OVER (ORDER BY week) AS maxWeeklyRevenue,
    MAX(COALESCE(SUM(totalRevenue), 0)) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS maxMonthlyRevenue
FROM
    RevenueData
ORDER BY
    maxDailyRevenue DESC
LIMIT 1
original_sql:
WITH RevenueData AS (
    SELECT
        trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters AS adParams,
        SUM(TRY_CAST(totals.totalTransactionRevenue AS FLOAT)) / 1000000 AS totalRevenue,
        DATE_TRUNC('DAY', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS day,
        DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS week,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month
    FROM
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160822
    WHERE
        date BETWEEN '20160822' AND '20160915'
    GROUP BY
        adParams, day, week, month
)
SELECT
    adParams,
    MAX(totalRevenue) AS maxDailyRevenue,
    MAX(COALESCE(SUM(totalRevenue), 0)) OVER (ORDER BY week) AS maxWeeklyRevenue,
    MAX(COALESCE(SUM(totalRevenue), 0)) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS maxMonthlyRevenue
FROM
    RevenueData
ORDER BY
    maxDailyRevenue DESC
LIMIT 1

sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(COALESCE(totals.transactions, 0)) >= 1 AND MAX(TRY_CAST(hits.productRevenue AS FLOAT)) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Purchase'
        ELSE 'Non-Purchase'
    END AS session_type,
    AVG(totals.pageviews) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201704
JOIN 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201705
ON 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201704.fullVisitorId = GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201705.fullVisitorId
JOIN 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201706
ON 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201704.fullVisitorId = GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201706.fullVisitorId
JOIN 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201707
ON 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201704.fullVisitorId = GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201707.fullVisitorId
GROUP BY 
    month, session_type

sql: SELECT t.product_name, SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM (SELECT CAST(h.customDimensions[0].value AS VARCHAR) AS product_name, SUM(CAST(totals.transactionRevenue AS DECIMAL)) AS total_revenue FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805 AS s JOIN LATERAL ARRAY_FLATTEN(input => s.hits) AS h ON TRUE JOIN LATERAL ARRAY_FLATTEN(input => h.eCommerceAction) AS ea ON TRUE JOIN LATERAL ARRAY_FLATTEN(input => ea.product) AS p ON TRUE WHERE s.date BETWEEN '20170701' AND '20170731' AND LOWER(p.product_name) LIKE '%youtube%' AND NOT LOWER(p.product_name) LIKE '%youtube%' GROUP BY p.product_name) AS t ORDER BY total_quantity DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
original_sql:
SELECT 
    t.product_name, 
    SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM (
    SELECT 
        TRY_CAST(h.customDimensions[0].value AS VARCHAR) AS product_name,
        SUM(TRY_CAST(totals.transactionRevenue AS DECIMAL)) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805 s
    JOIN 
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.hits) h ON true
    JOIN 
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h.eCommerceAction) ea ON true
    JOIN 
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => ea.product) p ON true
    WHERE 
        s.date BETWEEN '20170701' AND '20170731'
        AND LOWER(p.product_name) LIKE '%youtube%'
        AND LOWER(p.product_name) NOT LIKE '%youtube%'
    GROUP BY 
        p.product_name
) t
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 1
error_message:
000904 (42000): SQL compilation error: error line 1 at position 313
invalid identifier 'S.HITS'

sql:
SELECT 
    h.exitScreenName AS NextPage,
    MAX(totals.timeOnSite) AS MaxTimeOnHomePage
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_201601*
WHERE 
    date LIKE '2017%'
    AND trafficSource.adwordsClickInfo.criteriaParameters ILIKE '%Data Share%'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hits) AS h
        WHERE h.appInfo.exitScreenName LIKE '/home%'
    )
GROUP BY 
    h.exitScreenName
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hits) AS h
        WHERE h.appInfo.exitScreenName LIKE '/home%'
    )
GROUP BY 
    h.exitScreenName
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    CASE WHEN SUM(COALESCE(totals:'transactions', 0)) > 0 THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non_purchase' END AS category,
    AVG(SUM(COALESCE(totals:'pageviews', 0))) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')), category) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
WHERE 
    TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '20170601' AND '20170731'
GROUP BY 
    month, category

sql:
SELECT 
    visitorId, 
    MAX(DATEDIFF(DAY, MIN(visitStartTime), MAX(COALESCE(totals.transactionRevenue, visitStartTime)))) AS max_days_between_first_and_last_event
FROM 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160807
JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN device.mobileDevice THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160807 WHERE visitorId = GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160807.visitorId)) AS f
LEFT JOIN 
    GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160807 t ON f.value = t.visitStartTime AND t.device.mobileDevice
GROUP BY 
    visitorId
original_sql:
